calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Stern, Esq. 415-268-7637 and Tim Kline, Esq. 415-268-7860 of Morrison Foerster for Plaintiff.
Neha Gupta, Deputy City Attorney and Jeremy Goldman, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-4700 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares it's views, may have been bias but not enough for a tro. Plaintiff argues, submits a document in Open Court, asks questions. The Court discloses he sympathizes with the Judges who made the rulings. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For A Protective Order.

Granted in whole for reasons stated on the record. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
